title: Miro for Beginners: Create an interactive presentation
description:
In this 1.5-hour project-based course, you will learn how to create an interactive client partnership proposal presentation using Miro, an online collaborative whiteboard platform. You will step into the role of a Lead Sales Engineer, design an engaging, interactive presentation that discussed and showcases the details and potential of a client partnership. You will learn how to outline key features, communicate the value proposition, and use Miro’s interactive tools to facilitate a collaborative decision-making process with the client/partner.

This course is ideal for learners interested in developing client-facing presentations, improving their collaboration skills, and learning how to effectively use Miro collaboratively for business presentations. No prior experience with Miro is required, any user with basic computer skills can successfully complete this project, however basic familiarity with Miro is preferable.
